description: Color photograph taken inside a manufacturing or upholstery workshop or warehouse, with shelving full of boxes and materials and fluorescent lighting overhead. In the foreground a seated older Black woman wearing glasses, gray locs, and a bright yellow or gold t-shirt (with a small logo) looks up and smiles toward a woman standing on the right, a white woman with long dark hair, glasses, and a light blue blazer, who is examining a green floral fabric. At the far left a videographer in a blue shirt films the interaction with a professional camera. The image has no on-image text, seal, or graphic design. The tweet adds: 'We'll never give up our mission. AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST!'
notable_text: (none on image; tweet text: 'We'll never give up our mission. AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST!')
